blocks.text: Specific actions and conditions break the state of Wudu, requiring it to be performed again before prayer.
Anything that exits from the two private parts (urine, feces, gas) breaks Wudu.
Deep sleep where one loses consciousness of their surroundings breaks Wudu.
Fainting or any form of loss of consciousness breaks the state of purification.
Minor bleeding or vomiting does not break Wudu according to the majority of scholars, though some schools of thought have different views.
